-(%0A%09%22bufio%22%0A%09%22fmt%22%0A%09%22os%22%0A)%0A%0Atype DNode struct %7B%0A%09Value rune%0A%09next  *DNode%0A%09prev  *DNode%0A%09root  *DNode%0A%7D%0A%0Atype DList struct %7B%0A%09root *DNode%0A%09size int%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc NewDList() *DList %7B%0A%09root := &DNode%7B%7D%0A%09root.next = root%0A%09root.prev = root%0A%09root.root = root%0A%09return &DList%7Broot: root, size: 0%7D%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc (l *DList) Insert(it *DNode, value rune) *DNode %7B%0A%09n := &DNode%7BValue: value, root: l.root%7D%0A%09n.prev = it.prev%0A%09n.next = it%0A%09it.prev.next = n%0A%09it.prev = n%0A%09l.size++%0A%09return n%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc (l *DList) Erase(it *DNode) *DNode %7B%0A%09if it == l.root %7C%7C it == nil %7B%0A%09%09return it%0A%09%7D%0A%09next := it.next%0A%09it.prev.next = it.next%0A%09it.next.prev = it.prev%0A%09l.size--%0A%09return next%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc (l *DList) ToString(cursor *DNode) string %7B%0A%09var res %5B%5Drune%0A%09for n := l.root.next; n != l.root; n = n.next %7B%0A%09%09if n == cursor %7B%0A%09%09%09res = append(res, '%7C')%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%09res = append(res, n.Value)%0A%09%7D%0A%09if cursor == l.root %7B%0A%09%09res = append(res, '%7C')%0A%09%7D%0A%09return string(res)%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc main() %7B%0A%09scanner := bufio.NewScanner(os.Stdin)%0A%09if !scanner.Scan() %7B%0A%09%09return%0A%09%7D%0A%09input := scanner.Text()%0A%0A%09l := NewDList()%0A%09cursor := l.root%0A%0A%09for _, char := range input %7B%0A%09%09switch char %7B%0A%09%09case 'R':%0A%09%09%09l.Insert(cursor, '%5Cn')%0A%09%09case 'B':%0A%09%09%09if cursor.prev != l.root %7B%0A%09%09%09%09l.Erase(cursor.prev)%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09case 'D':%0A%09%09%09if cursor != l.root %7B%0A%09%09%09%09cursor = l.Erase(cursor)%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09case '%3E':%0A%09%09%09if cursor != l.root %7B%0A%09%09%09%09cursor = cursor.next%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09case '%3C':%0A%09%09%09if cursor.prev != l.root %7B%0A%09%09%09%09cursor = cursor.prev%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09default:%0A%09%09%09l.Insert(cursor, char)%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%7D%0A%0A%09fmt.Println(l.ToString(cursor)
+%22fmt%22%0Afunc main() %7B%0A    fmt.Println(%22Hello, World!%22
